description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on workflow dispatch, push to non-tagged master branch, and pull requests to master. The workflow has concurrency control, canceling in-progress runs for non-master refs. It sets environment variables TARGET, MAKE_DEBUG, and runs two jobs: e2e-tests and rust-tests, both using the defi/ain-builder:latest container on ubuntu-latest. The jobs check out code, populate environment, install dependencies, restore build caches, build, and run tests.
